data.title: Energy Fuels' rare earth processing expansion has lower CAPEX, high EBITDA, and low production costs. 6,000 tpa NdPr planned.
data.description: Energy Fuels is set to become the primary rare earth producer in the western region, with plans to produce 6,000 tonnes per annum (tpa) of NdPr, 240 tpa of Dysprosium, and 66 tpa of Terbium. This development aims to revitalize the US rare earth supply chain. The company's strategic investment allows for a first quartile cost position, positioning them for substantial growth in the industry. The announcement, made in Denver on January 15, 2026, underscores Energy Fuels' commitment to fostering domestic rare earth production and reducing reliance on foreign sources.

data.title: EeroQ solves "Wire Problem" in quantum computing, enabling control of up to 1M electrons with fewer than 50 wires.
data.description: A breakthrough was achieved by EeroQ, a quantum computing company based in Chicago, on Jan. 15, 2026, as they eliminated a significant impediment to scalability. The company unveiled a quantum computing control chip capable of managing up to 1 million electrons with less than 50 wires. This innovation marks a pivotal moment in quantum computing technology, potentially revolutionizing the industry's capabilities.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper launches public offer for JDE Peet's shares at 31.85 euros ($37.03) each, plans to split post-acquisition.
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) and JDE Peet's N.V. have officially announced a recommended public cash offer by Kodiak BidCo B.V. for all outstanding ordinary shares of JDE Peet's. The offer stands at 31.85 euros ($37.03) per share in cash, with the Offer Memorandum released on January 15, 2026. Additionally, JDE Peet's will distribute a cash dividend of 0.36 euros per share on January 23, 2026, which will not impact the offer price. After the acquisition, KDP intends to divide into two separate U.S.-listed public companies.

data.title: Record-high ransomware activity reported by GuidePoint Security, with surge in victims and threat groups, according to GRIT 2026 report.
data.description: Reston, Virginia - GuidePoint Security has released their GRIT 2026 Ransomware & Cyber Threat Report, indicating a significant increase in ransomware incidents. The report shows that ransomware activity has reached an all-time high, highlighting the severity of cyber threats facing organizations.

data.title: Jan 15, 2026 earnings report preview: BLK expected $12.34 EPS, $6.75B revenue; TSM expected $2.79 EPS, $33.27B revenue; MS expected $2.43 EPS, $17.58B revenue.
data.description: Before the market opening, key companies are set to release their earnings reports. BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) is anticipated to announce earnings of $12.34 per share with an estimated revenue of $6.75 billion. Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE: TSM) is expected to reveal earnings of $2.79 per share alongside revenue of $33.27 billion. Meanwhile, Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) is projected to report earnings of $2.43 per share with an expected revenue of $17.58 billion. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Goliath Resources had a successful shareholder meeting on Jan. 14, 2026, where the Board of Directors decided not to proceed with consolidation.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Goliath Resources Limited (TSX-V: GOT) (OTCQB: GOTRF) (Frankfurt: B4IF) successfully conducted its annual and special shareholder meeting in Toronto. The company, referred to as "Goliath," shared positive outcomes as all agenda items were approved by the necessary voting margins. This included crucial decisions impacting the future of the company. The meeting brought together shareholders and key executives to discuss and vote on significant matters affecting the business. The successful outcome indicates a unified vision and support for Goliath's strategic direction among shareholders.

data.title: TRX Gold's Q1 2026: Record production and strong financial results persist.
data.description: In 2026, an impressive record production level has been maintained, alongside a commendable financial performance that has stayed robust. This consistent trend showcases the resilience and efficiency of the operations during this period. The noteworthy figures highlight the achievement and success achieved in terms of output and financial results without providing specific numbers.

data.title: Comstock Metals expands recycling network with end-of-life solar facility in Ohio, secures expandable storage site. #LODE #solarrecycling.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) based in Virginia City, Nevada, revealed the acquisition of a new storage site for its subsidiary, Comstock Metals LLC. This subsidiary is recognized for its sustainable approach to recycling end-of-life solar panels and holds the distinction of being the sole certified zero-landfill solar recycling option in North America. The newly secured site has the potential to be developed into a large-scale recycling and processing facility for the industry.

data.title: Avalon Healthcare receives majority investment from WindRose Health Investors to drive Diagnostic Intelligence growth.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Tampa, Florida, Avalon Healthcare Solutions revealed a significant development as they announced a majority investment from WindRose Health Investors. This investment represents a crucial step for Avalon, a key player in Diagnostic Intelligence services for payers, as it provides them with enhanced resources to further their mission. Alongside this new investment, Avalon will continue to receive support from their current investor, Francisco. This strategic move solidifies Avalon's position in the healthcare industry and marks a significant milestone in their growth trajectory.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties hires new Relocation Director, Sarah Riach, to enhance services.
data.description: Sarah Riach, a seasoned real estate executive known for her expertise in leading relocation programs, has joined Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in San Diego. Previously serving as a relocation director for a prominent national brokerage, she specialized in developing efficient processes and enhancing partnerships with relocation providers. With her wealth of experience, Riach is set to contribute to providing clients and stakeholders with a seamless, comprehensive service.

data.title: Top Wall Street analysts expect PNC Financial Q4 earnings of $4.21/share, revenue of $5.95B; shares close at $212.32.
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings prior to the market opening on Friday, Jan. 16. Analysts are anticipating a profit of $4.21 per share, surpassing the previous year's $3.77 per share. The consensus among analysts suggests that PNC Financial's quarterly revenue will hit $5.95 billion, up from $5.57 billion recorded last year. Furthermore, PNC recently announced a dividend of $1.70 per share on common stock. Despite this news, the company's shares experienced a slight 0.1% decrease, concluding the day at $212.32 on Wednesday. For additional insights, interested parties can review the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro. Access the full article on Benzinga.com for more information.
